# Great Docs

Your Python package deserves a website that looks like you actually care about it. Great Docs turns your docstrings, README, and CLI into a polished documentation site. No templates to wrangle, no config files to debug, it's really great.

## Three Commands. One Beautiful Site.

```bash
pip install great-docs

cd your-python-package
great-docs init      # scans your package, writes the config
great-docs build     # generates everything, renders with Quarto
great-docs preview   # live preview at localhost:3000
```

That's it. Your API reference, user guide, CLI docs, and landing page: all generated, all styled, all linked. Push to GitHub and you're live.

## Your Docstrings, Finally Doing Their Job

Every class, function, method, and attribute in your public API gets its own structured page. Parameter tables, return types, source links, and rendered examples. Numpy, Google, and Sphinx docstring styles all work out of the box.

If your package has a Click CLI, that's documented as well (complete with terminal-style help output and subcommand trees).

## Looks Good Without Trying

Dark mode with a persistent toggle. Animated gradient navbars in eight presets. GitHub star counts in the corner. Sidebar search for large APIs. Responsive on every screen. Announcement banners when you ship something big.

Your package gets a site that matches the quality of the code behind it.

## AI-Native from Day One

Great Docs generates `llms.txt` and `llms-full.txt` so AI coding agents can understand your library without scraping HTML. It also produces Agent Skills files: structured metadata that tells tools like Copilot, Cursor, and Claude Code *how* to use your package (not just what it exports).

## Deploy in One Step

```bash
great-docs setup-github-pages
```

Creates a GitHub Actions workflow. Every push to `main` rebuilds and publishes your site automatically.

## Go Further

```{=html}
<div class="gd-cta-grid">
  <a href="user-guide/installation.html" class="gd-cta-card">
    <span class="gd-cta-icon">📖</span>
    <span class="gd-cta-title">User Guide</span>
    <span class="gd-cta-desc">Installation, configuration, theming, multi-version docs, and deployment.</span>
    <span class="gd-cta-arrow">→</span>
  </a>
  <a href="recipes/hide-internal-symbols.html" class="gd-cta-card">
    <span class="gd-cta-icon">🍳</span>
    <span class="gd-cta-title">Recipes</span>
    <span class="gd-cta-desc">Bite-sized guides for specific tasks: copy, paste, done.</span>
    <span class="gd-cta-arrow">→</span>
  </a>
  <a href="reference/index.html" class="gd-cta-card">
    <span class="gd-cta-icon">⚙️</span>
    <span class="gd-cta-title">API Reference</span>
    <span class="gd-cta-desc">Great Docs documenting itself (every class, function, and option).</span>
    <span class="gd-cta-arrow">→</span>
  </a>
</div>
```

```{=html}
<div class="gd-feature-wall">
<h2 class="gd-fw-heading">And So Much More.</h2>
<p class="gd-fw-large"><b>Auto-Generated API Ref&shy;er&shy;ence</b>&nbsp;• Dark Mode Toggle&nbsp;• <b>llms.txt &amp; Agent Skills</b>&nbsp;• Multi-Version Docu&shy;men&shy;ta&shy;tion&nbsp;• <b>GitHub Pages in One Com&shy;mand</b>&nbsp;• Click CLI Docu&shy;men&shy;ta&shy;tion&nbsp;• <b>Animated Gradient Nav&shy;bars &amp; Ban&shy;ners</b>&nbsp;• Three Com&shy;mands to Launch&nbsp;• <b>Change&shy;log from GitHub Re&shy;leases</b>&nbsp;• Hero Section Support&nbsp;• <b>Rich Table Pre&shy;views for Pandas, Polars &amp; Arrow</b></p>
<p class="gd-fw-medium"><b>Numpy, Google &amp; Sphinx Doc&shy;strings</b>&nbsp;• Version Selector Widget&nbsp;• <b>Side&shy;bar Search &amp; Fil&shy;ter&shy;ing</b>&nbsp;• Page Tags &amp; Status Badges&nbsp;• <b>Mer&shy;maid Dia&shy;gram Ren&shy;der&shy;ing</b>&nbsp;• Inter&shy;active Table Ex&shy;plor&shy;er&nbsp;• <b>Docu&shy;men&shy;ta&shy;tion Linter</b>&nbsp;• Spelling &amp; Grammar Check&shy;ing&nbsp;• <b>Twenty-Three Lan&shy;guages</b>&nbsp;• Key&shy;board Navi&shy;ga&shy;tion&nbsp;• <b>Custom Sections &amp; Recipes</b>&nbsp;• Respon&shy;sive on Every Screen&nbsp;• <b>GitHub Star Count Widget</b>&nbsp;• SEO Audit &amp; Site&shy;map Gen&shy;er&shy;a&shy;tion&nbsp;• <b>Announce&shy;ment Ban&shy;ners</b>&nbsp;• Auto-Detected Logos with Dark-Mode Vari&shy;ants&nbsp;• <b>API Diff Between Ver&shy;sions</b>&nbsp;• Tool&shy;tips &amp; Pop&shy;overs&nbsp;• <b>Rich Meta&shy;data Side&shy;bar with De&shy;vel&shy;oper Links</b>&nbsp;• Code Auto&shy;links in Doc&shy;strings&nbsp;• <b>Sub&shy;mod&shy;ule Intro&shy;spec&shy;tion</b>&nbsp;• Copy &amp; View Page as Mark&shy;down&nbsp;</p>
<p class="gd-fw-small"><b>APCA Contrast Algo&shy;rithm</b>&nbsp;• Fav&shy;icon Auto-Gen&shy;er&shy;a&shy;tion&nbsp;• <b>Scale-to-Fit Wide Tables</b>&nbsp;• Copy Code Buttons&nbsp;• <b>Syn&shy;tax High&shy;light&shy;ing &amp; Exe&shy;cut&shy;able Code Blocks</b>&nbsp;• In&shy;line Icons&nbsp;• <b>Version Fences &amp; Badges</b>&nbsp;• Breaking Change Detec&shy;tion&nbsp;• <b>API Sur&shy;face Time&shy;line</b>&nbsp;• Param&shy;eter Evo&shy;lu&shy;tion Tables&nbsp;• <b>JSON-LD Struc&shy;tured Data</b>&nbsp;• Canon&shy;ical URLs&nbsp;• <b>Social Cards &amp; Open Graph</b>&nbsp;• Source Links to GitHub&nbsp;• <b>1,941 Bundled Lucide Icons</b>&nbsp;• Commu&shy;nity File Pages&nbsp;• <b>SPDX License Data&shy;base</b>&nbsp;• PR Pre&shy;view Deploy&shy;ments&nbsp;• <b>Custom SCSS Theming</b>&nbsp;• Blog Sup&shy;port&nbsp;• <b>Cross-Refs, %see&shy;also &amp; In&shy;line Inter&shy;links</b>&nbsp;• Video Embeds&nbsp;• <b>Color Swatches</b>&nbsp;• Tab&shy;sets &amp; Cal&shy;louts&nbsp;• Link Checker&nbsp;• <b>Config Gen&shy;er&shy;a&shy;tion</b>&nbsp;• Robots.txt &amp; Crawl Rules&nbsp;• <b>Non-Breaking Re&shy;build Mode</b>&nbsp;• API Snap&shy;shots to JSON&nbsp;• <b>Custom Static Pages</b>&nbsp;• Object-Type Label Colors&nbsp;• <b>Styled Sig&shy;na&shy;tures &amp; Type Anno&shy;ta&shy;tions</b>&nbsp;• <b>Meth&shy;od Mem&shy;ber Con&shy;trol &amp; Ex&shy;clude Lists</b>&nbsp;• Nav&shy;bar &amp; Side&shy;bar Icons&nbsp;• Back-to-Top Button&nbsp;• <b>Verbose Build Log&shy;ging</b>&nbsp;• Custom Head In&shy;jec&shy;tion for Scripts &amp; Meta&nbsp;• And Yes, It Builds <em>Fast</em></p>
</div>
```

```{=html}
<hr class="gd-fw-rule">
<div class="gd-fw-closing">
<p>Something missing? <a href="https://github.com/posit-dev/great-docs/issues">Open an issue</a> (the wall o' text above is not done yet).</p>
</div>
```
